name: PowerShell Encoded Command Execution
description: Detects execution of PowerShell with Base64 encoded commands - common malware technique
query:
// PowerShell Encoded Command Detection
// Encoded commands often used to obfuscate malicious payloads
events from endpoint
where process_name = "powershell.exe"
  and (command_line contains "-enc" or command_line contains "-EncodedCommand")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
